- **Unquoted Service Path**Â â This can be exploited for privilege escalation.
- **Weak Password Encryption**Â â This allows attackers to decrypt user passwords stored on the Argus Surveillance DVR web interface.

- **Directory Traversal**Â â This vulnerability can be used to read local files on the target server.
